title: Full Screen Sections

statement.markdown:
Create a webpage with full-screen sections for each of the following elements: 
    A hero section with a background image and a title, 
    A section with a list of features and descriptions, 
    A section with a video or iframe and a call-to-action link, 
    A section with a testimonial and a client logo. 
### Requirements
1. Use Tailwind CSS classes for styling. 
2. Make sure each section takes up the full screen. 
3. Use meaningful image alt attributes for accessibility. 
4. Add a background image to the hero section. 
5. Use a video or iframe in the third section. 
6. Add a testimonial and a client logo to the fourth section. 
7. Make sure the layout is responsive and works on different screen sizes.

constraints: HTML is the foundation of your webpage.
Tailwind CSS is the styling library you will be using.
